evidence: runScript function returns null for ANY error (file not found, timeout, parse error, script crash) - no error propagation to distinguish failure modes
SKILL.md and improvement-journal.cjs STOP_REASONS enum correctly exclude 'plateau', but README.md incorrectly claims it is a first-class stop type
SKILL.md frontmatter shows version: 1.2.2.0 but latest changelog is v1.6.0.0 - version contract broken
v1.4.0.0.md changelog claims 'deep-agent-improvement → deep-agent-improvement' rename (no-op) - placeholder content
SKILL.md correctly documents CLI contract for improvement-journal.cjs (not MCP server) - finding mischaracterizes as 'stale MCP tool references' when no MCP references exist
scoreDimStructural returns score: 100 with maxPossible: 0 when no checks exist - creates perfect score for empty check set, misleading and NaN risk
computeMutationSignature has no validation that required fields (dimension, mutationType) are non-empty - empty strings produce identical signatures
YAML workflow uses 'target-manifest.jsonc' (hyphen) but actual file is 'target_manifest.jsonc' (underscore) - path mismatch causes initialization failure
scan-integration.cjs line 114 uses '.opencode/command' (singular) but actual directory is '.opencode/commands' (plural) - command scanning fails
promote-candidate.cjs only copies to canonical .opencode/agents/ target, no mirror sync to .claude/, .gemini/, .codex/ directories
generate-profile.cjs includes generatedAt timestamp but no schema version or rubric version - no validation that profile matches agent behavior pattern
Weights hardcoded in both score-candidate.cjs and improvement_config.json with no sync mechanism, no rubric version in score output
Sample run showed empty dimension arrays in experiment-registry.json despite scoring - data quality issue
Subsumed by DAI-018 - once v1.4.0.0 placeholder is resolved, origin question becomes moot
Historical artifact from plural rename refactor - all current path references are correct, issue already resolved
